events.text: [He's standing at the exact centre of the crossroads. Not waiting. Just standing. Like a person who decided to stop somewhere and ran out of reasons to move.]
Including your ritual. Including the pieces you've gathered. Including this.
I asked myself that for a long time.
I think I'm here because some part of me didn't listen to the part that knew better. And I'm grateful for that.
[Silence. A long one. Neither of you fills it.]
You've travelled a long way to stand here and know that.
Something in you was still looking. Even knowing it wouldn't find anything. I think that matters more than the finding.

events.label: choice_hurt
events.text: Because the pain response doesn't care about your metaphysics.
Meaning is optional. Sensation isn't. You're stuck with both whether you endorse them or not.

choices.text: That sounds like a reason to end it.
That sounds like a reason to stay.

events.label: hurt_end
events.text: Sure. Or a reason that neither ending nor staying is the point.
The point, if there is one, is what you do between the beginning and whatever comes after.
